title: euryops candollei
intro: Euryops candollei, also known as the yellow daisy or ever-sunny, is a shrub-like perennial plant native to South Africa, belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which have been attributed to its essential oil and other bioactive compounds. The medicinal properties of Euryops candollei have been found to have various health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant are commonly used in the form of teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be applied topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
